title: abutilon virginianum
intro: Abutilon virginianum, also known as the Virgin's gourd or Lady's calico, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Abutilon virginianum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
